Credit Only Granted for: EDHI755, EDPL755, or EDPS755.

Formerly: EDPL755.

EDHI759 Seminar in Adult and Continuing Education (3 Credits) Current issues and problems in adult and continuing education and lifelong learning in America.

Formerly: EDPL759.

EDHI788 Special Topics in Education Policy and Administration (1-3 Credits)

Special and intensive treatment of current topics and issues in education policy and administration.
